mapper.select: SELECT bt.id, bt.trip_no, bt.user_id, bt.dept_id, bt.destination, bt.trip_type, bt.start_date, bt.end_date, bt.days, bt.reason, bt.budget_amount, bt.budget_remark, bt.attachments, bt.emergency_contact, bt.emergency_phone, bt.status, bt.process_instance_id, bt.current_approver_id, bt.create_time, CASE bt.trip_type WHEN 'DOMESTIC' THEN '国内出差' WHEN 'OVERSEAS' THEN '海外出差' WHEN 'LOCAL' THEN '本地出差' WHEN 'SHORT' THEN '短途出差' WHEN 'LONG' THEN '长途出差' ELSE bt.trip_type END as tripTypeName, CASE bt.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'APPROVED' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已拒绝' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '已撤回' ELSE bt.status END as statusName FROM oa_business_trip bt WHERE bt.id = #{id}

SELECT bt.id, bt.trip_no AS tripNo, bt.user_id AS userId, bt.destination, bt.trip_type AS tripType, bt.start_date AS startDate, bt.end_date AS endDate, bt.days, bt.reason, bt.status, bt.create_time AS createTime FROM oa_business_trip bt WHERE bt.user_id = #{userId} AND bt.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY bt.create_time DESC
